Bus Timings

F28 Bus Timings Emirates Tower Metro Seaside to Satwa, Masjid and Back

March 3, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F28 is a vital public transportation service in Dubai, offering efficient and reliable connectivity between key destinations. With its regular service throughout the day, Bus F28 ensures convenient access to various neighborhoods and landmarks in Dubai.

Route Name F28
Route Description Emirates Tower Metro Seaside - Satwa, Masjid - Emirates Tower Metro Seaside
Total Distance Approximately 7-10 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 20-30 minutes
Operational Hours 04:24 to 01:11 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F28

Bus F28 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus F28 operates with frequent departures from both terminals, ensuring flexibility and convenience for passengers. Below are the bus timings:

From Emirates Tower Metro Seaside From Satwa Masjid

Bus F28 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can refer to the official RTA website, or follow this link to view the F28 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus F28 is based on the number of zones traveled, with a single zone costing AED 3. This pricing structure ensures an affordable and comfortable commute within Dubai. Multi-zone fares are available for longer journeys, offering a budget-friendly way to explore the city without compromising service quality. Discounts may apply for regular commuters or multiple tickets.

Bus Booking

Bus F28 does not offer online booking. Tickets can be purchased directly on the bus or at designated stations. For real-time updates and route information, use the RTA Dubai app, which provides details on schedules and allows passengers to track buses, enhancing convenience. The app also offers route planning to streamline your travel experience.

Bus Route

The Bus F28 route provides a comprehensive journey between Emirates Tower Metro Seaside and Satwa Masjid, and then returns to Emirates Tower Metro Seaside. Key stops along the route include:

  1. Emirates Tower Metro Seaside

  2. Rostamani Tower

  3. Wasl, Masjid

  4. Wasl, School

  5. Khadri Masjid

  6. Satwa Square

  7. Satwa, Masjid

  8. Satwa, Post Office

  9. Satwa, Roundabout

  10. Trade Center Metro Station

  11. White Crown Tower

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Durrah Tower

  2. Emirates Tower Metro Seaside

This route covers a range of commercial, educational, and residential areas, offering easy access to various city landmarks and facilities.

Bus F28 Station Overview

Emirates Tower Metro Seaside

The Emirates Tower Metro Seaside station serves as a vital connection point adjacent to the Emirates Towers area. Located close to the Emirates Towers metro station, it offers seamless access for commuters transferring between bus and metro services.

It features modern amenities, including comfortable waiting areas and real-time service updates, ensuring a smooth and efficient transit experience.

White Crown Tower Bus Stop Intersection

The White Crown Tower Bus Stop is a key transit point where Bus Routes 21, 98E, F11, and F28 intersect. This station offers passengers easy access to various destinations across Dubai, enhancing connectivity for both daily commuters and visitors. Its strategic location near important landmarks and commercial areas makes it a convenient stop for those traveling through the city, providing seamless transfers between these bus routes.

Satwa, Masjid

The Satwa, Masjid station is an important stop within the bustling Satwa neighborhood, known for its vibrant community and various local amenities. Situated near a prominent mosque, this station caters to both local residents and visitors.

It provides essential services for those traveling to and from the area, connecting them with key destinations across the city. Its central location in Satwa ensures easy access to surrounding shops, eateries, and other services.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus F28 passes by several notable landmarks and destinations in Dubai: 1.

  1. Rostamani Tower: Located in the heart of Dubai, offering access to various commercial and dining options.

  2. Satwa Square: A bustling area with vibrant markets and dining options.

  3. Satwa, Masjid: A key cultural and religious site.

  4. Trade Center Metro Station: Near the Dubai International Convention and Exhibition Centre, a major venue for events and exhibitions.

  5. White Crown Tower: Located in a prominent business district with views of the Dubai skyline.

  6. Durrah Tower: Offers luxury apartments and is situated in a central location with easy access to other attractions.

These stops provide access to various commercial, cultural, and historical sites, making Bus F28 a convenient route for exploring Dubai.

Journey Experience

A trip on the F28 bus route from Emirates Tower Metro Seaside to Satwa, Masjid offers a long yet fascinating journey through the heart of Dubai.

As the bus heads towards Satwa, it passes through more traditional and local neighborhoods, offering a contrast between the city’s modern and cultural aspects. The route provides not only a convenient commute but also a scenic tour of the city’s diverse urban landscape.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Satwa, Masjid, the furthest stop on the F28 bus route starting from Emirates Tower Metro Seaside. The fare for this trip ranges between AED 38 and AED 45, offering a comfortable and efficient way to reach your destination. The app provides real-time updates and fare estimates, making your journey smoother and more predictable.

In conclusion, Bus F28 connects Emirates Tower Metro Seaside with Satwa Masjid, covering essential commercial and residential areas in Dubai. It offers frequent departures and an affordable fare structure, making it a reliable choice for daily travel. The route includes key stops, providing easy access to popular landmarks. For real-time updates, passengers can use the RTA Dubai app. Overall, Bus F28 is a practical and convenient option for navigating Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 3, 2026.
